doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_clear_erangeflag (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L192-L198). Three-line C body: `__gmpfr_flags &= MPFR_FLAGS_ALL ^ MPFR_FLAGS_ERANGE` -- clear the ERANGE bit (bit 4 = 16). C returns void.

The TS port follows the immutable flag-family contract. In-library wiring: clearFlags(MPFR_FLAGS_ERANGE).

Class 'misc'. Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c: Three: (1) void -> bigint; (2) void -> mask:bigint; (3) `mask & (63n ^ 16n) = mask & 47n`.
